.. Automatic Computation for Robot Design (ACRoD) documentation master file, created by
   sphinx-quickstart on Mon May 29 02:33:09 2023.

   contain the root `toctree` directive.

Welcome to Automatic Computation for Robot Design (ACRoD)'s documentation!
==========================================================================

For Jacobian-based performance optimisation a robot, computing Jacobian of the robot is vital. Formulating Jacobian of parallel manipulators is more tedious when compared to that of serial manipulators. For formulating Jacobian for a specified topology, everything can be automated.

ACRoD is a Python package aimed to automate computations for robot design. 

Currently available features:
_____________________________

- Automatic Jacobian formulation for a robot of specified topology around a specified end-effector point for use in optimisation for designing dimensions of the robot for optimal performance around that end-effector point.
